pullMode.message: This GitHub proof does not create PULLS snapshots. It reads AWS EventBridge-generated 15-minute pull history from DynamoDB.

temporalFeatures.policy: Only timestamped observations at or before cutoffAtUtc are included.
Only timestamped observations at or before cutoffAtUtc are included.

predictions.reason: Single-game MLB moneyline pick ranked by de-vigged book probability, real bettable price, EV, edge, line movement, book agreement, reversals, and guardrails.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.note: Only downstream-gated official/actionable selections count toward the 90% target; every game still keeps a visible winner prediction.

fundamentalsLayer.message: No verified MLB fundamentals package matched this game. Market signal remains primary.

calibration.note: Calibration intentionally compresses aggressive raw scores toward market consensus and penalizes instability.

pickDiscipline.rule: Every game can receive a prediction, but only rows passing this gate are actionable picks.

winnerStackV2.policy: Every game receives a locked prediction; only actionablePick=true rows are primary picks.

reversal.auditUse: Compare count, density, and size proxy against eventual winning team after final score settlement.

directionalScoreV1.officialPolicy: premium_clean_market_only; validated ML may promote after this gate

fundamentalsSnapshot.sourceHonestyPolicy: Missing fundamentals remain explicitly missing and are never inferred from odds movement.

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.policy: Every game receives a visible optimized winner prediction. Weak or reversal-heavy directional selections fall back to the de-vigged market leader; non-market overrides require clean confirmed movement. Official/actionable status is assigned only by downstream risk and validated-ML gates.

balancedSignalGate.rule: Promote only market-backed rows with no hard block when the normal gate outputs zero.

signalPolicyV13.policy: Audit findings adjust score only. No signal rule removes a required game prediction. Every MLB game keeps one visible platform winner pick; playable status remains separate.

mlOverlay.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
mlOverlay.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

rolling24hAccuracyTarget.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game
rolling24hAccuracyTarget.playableMeaning: higher-confidence wagering recommendation; separate from official prediction

predictionSemantics.officialPredictionMeaning: immutable winner selected for a slate-locked game

mlOptimizationRuntime.safetyPolicy: Each authority requires its own promoted valid model; playability also requires a validation-selected reliability threshold.

mlbLatestBuild.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.
mlbLatestBuild.message: Cannot build a three-leg parlay without three unique games or matches.

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

mlbLatestBuild.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default

pullCoverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

results.requires: 2 MLB_STRONG + 1 MLB_LEAN_OR_STRONG; zero true COIN_FLIP by default
results.message: Cannot build a three-leg parlay without three unique games or matches.
results.candidateFilterPolicy: Candidates are the post-score subset where frozen=true and selected grade is MLB_STRONG or MLB_LEAN. This full board shows the pre-filter scoring pass for every MLB game.

pullDiagnostics.policy: Every requested sport with active same-day games or matches must have convertible markets for timestamped storage. Diagnostic probes do not create snapshots.
